title: Tezpur University Recruitment 2026 - Apply for 02 Assistant Professor Posts
description: Tezpur University has announced an official notification for the recruitment of 02 Assistant Professor Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the Post Graduation, Ph.D can grab this chance and apply for the Tezpur University Recruitment 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply before the last date of application. If you are looking for mor...
